title: FerrFlow Configuration
description: Configuration file for FerrFlow — universal semantic versioning for monorepos and classic repos.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

telemetry.description: Send anonymous usage statistics to improve FerrFlow.

versioning.description: Default versioning strategy for all packages.

tagTemplate.description: Tag template. Use {name} for package name and {version} for version. Default: 'v{version}' for single repos, '{name}@v{version}' for monorepos.

recoverMissedReleases.description: Compare files against the last tag instead of just the last commit, recovering missed releases in monorepos.

releaseCommitMode.description: How to commit version bumps and changelog updates. 'commit' pushes directly to the branch, 'pr' creates a pull request, 'none' skips committing entirely.

autoMergeReleases.description: Automatically merge release PRs when releaseCommitMode is 'pr'.

skipCi.description: Append [skip ci] to the release commit message. Defaults to true in 'commit' mode, false in 'pr' mode.

package.description: List of packages to version. Use one entry for single repos, multiple for monorepos.

name.description: Package name, used in tags and changelog headers.

path.description: Path to the package root, relative to the repo root. Use "." for single repos.

changelog.description: Path to the changelog file, relative to the repo root.

versionedFiles.description: Files that contain the package version to update on release.

path.description: Path to the version file, relative to the repo root.

format.description: File format used to locate and update the version field.

sharedPaths.description: Paths whose changes should trigger a version bump for this package (monorepo only).

versioning.description: Versioning strategy for this package. Overrides workspace default.

tagTemplate.description: Tag template for this package. Use {name} for package name and {version} for version. Overrides workspace default.
